summary: A Nordic welfare state with a globally outsized tech ecosystem (Spotify, IKEA, Ericsson, H&M) that broke 200 years of neutrality in 2022 by joining NATO in response to Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

history.detail: Union of Scandinavian kingdoms under Swedish-Danish crown.
Charles XII vs Russia; Sweden loses Baltic empire to Peter the Great.
Major territorial loss; Sweden begins long peace.
Last war fought; over 200 years of peace follow.
Social Democrats build model welfare state; 'Swedish model' exported globally.
Joins European Union but retains own currency (SEK).
Russia's Ukraine invasion ends neutrality; NATO membership confirmed 2024.

finance.currency_role: SEK; retained own currency outside eurozone

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Highest unicorn density per capita globally

resources.rare_earths: Europe's largest rare earth deposit found in Kiruna (2023)

follow_the_money.detail: Stockholm produces more unicorns per capita than any city outside Silicon Valley
Investor AB controls 40% of Stockholm Stock Exchange market cap

theories_disputed.detail: Swedish PM shot in street; case officially closed 2020 citing deceased suspect Stig Engström, but controversially.

connections.detail: NATO ally since 2024; growing defence cooperation
NATO membership triggered by Russian aggression
